Rules.InvariantScript: "This job must be opened in Vesta Measure (Legacy).  Are you sure you want to proceed?"

If(
    !IsBlank(gblRecordJobSpotlight), "Next Job",
    gblRecordJobSpotlight.'Start Date Time'<Now(), "Current Job", "Next Job"
)
"All jobs have been completed for today"

Switch(
    gblDateCurrent,
    Today() - 1,
    "Yesterday's Jobs",
    Today(),
    "Today's Jobs",
    Today() + 1,
    "Tomorrow's Jobs",
    Text(
        gblDateCurrent,
        "[$-en-US]ddd, mmm d"
    ) & " Jobs"
)

If(
    First(
        Sort(
            colCdsJobs,
            'Start Date Time',
            SortOrder.Ascending
        )
    ).'Start Date Time' <= gblDateCurrent,
    DisplayMode.Edit,
    DisplayMode.Disabled
)

If(
    First(
        Sort(
            colCdsJobs,
            'Start Date Time',
            SortOrder.Descending
        )
    ).'Start Date Time' >= gblDateCurrent+1
    Or Today() > gblDateCurrent,
    DisplayMode.Edit,
    DisplayMode.Disabled
)

Sort(
    Filter(
        colCdsJobs,
        'Start Date Time' >= gblDateCurrent And 'Start Date Time' < gblDateCurrent + 1
    ),
    'Start Date Time',
    SortOrder.Ascending
)
ThisItem.appJobIDText=gblRecordJobSpotlight.appJobIDText And gblRecordJobSpotlight.'Start Date Time'>=Today() And gblRecordJobSpotlight.'Start Date Time'<Today()+1
